title: astragalus scopulorum
intro: Astragalus scopulorum, also known as the Scopulorum milkvetch, is a type of perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to the mountainous regions of western North America. Traditionally, the roots of this plant are used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Astragalus scopulorum include boosting the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus scopulorum is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried root, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
